subject: TalentBeacon CAP 2026 – AI Research Internship Opportunity
body: Dear Student, TalentBeacon is excited to announce the Competitive Advancement Program (CAP) 2026 – a fully paid AI Research Internship for top CS and AI students. Duration: June–August 2026. Eligibility: Final or penultimate year BS/MS students in CS, AI, or related fields. Minimum CGPA: 3.2. Required Documents: Updated CV, transcript, and a 300-word statement of purpose. Apply by: 30th April 2026 at https://talentbeacon.ai/cap2026. Monthly stipend: PKR 60,000. You will work directly with NLP and ML teams on real-world projects involving large language models and text classification pipelines.

subject: Allama Iqbal Debate & Speech Competition – 21st April 2026
body: We are pleased to inform you that the Allama Iqbal Debate and Speech Competition will be held on 21st April, as part of the celebrations marking the 150th Birth Anniversary of Allama Muhammad Iqbal. Topics for both debate and speech competitions are attached. An essay competition is also being organized. Essay sheets can be collected from the Student Affairs Office on 13th April. Last date for submission: 17th April. Word limit: 1000–1500 words. Essay Competition Prizes: 1st Position: Rs. 500,000, 2nd Position: Rs. 300,000, 3rd Position: Rs. 200,000. Students interested in participating are required to complete their registration through the attached Google Form link.

subject: Akhuwat College Student Mentorship Program 2026 – Volunteer as a Mentor
body: Dear Student, Akhuwat College is pleased to share an excellent opportunity with you under the Student Mentorship Program 2026. This initiative is designed to connect talented intermediate students with mentors from leading institutions, including FAST-NUCES. As a FAST student or alumnus, you are encouraged to volunteer as a mentor and support students in: University admission guidance, Academic planning, and Career exploration. Eligibility Criteria: Current student or graduate of FAST, Minimum CGPA of 3.0, Availability to volunteer during the summer. Application Deadline: 26th April 2026. Application Form: https://forms.gle/kLbrsFhoX1MkNqsX6.

subject: SOFTEC 2026 AI Hackathon – Register Now!
body: SOFTEC 2026 AI Hackathon Competition is now open for registration! This year's theme: Opportunity Inbox Copilot – Email Parsing and Personalized Opportunity Ranking. Build an AI-powered system that scans student emails and ranks them by relevance and urgency. Eligibility: All FAST-NUCES students. Team size: 2–4 members. Event Date: 19th April 2026. Registration Deadline: 18th April 2026. Register at: https://softecnu.org/hackathon2026. Prizes: 1st Place PKR 150,000, 2nd Place PKR 80,000, 3rd Place PKR 40,000. Skills needed: Python, NLP, LLMs, Streamlit.

subject: HEC Need-Based Scholarship 2026 – Last Date Approaching
body: The Higher Education Commission (HEC) is inviting applications for the Need-Based Scholarship Program 2026. This scholarship covers full tuition fee plus a monthly stipend of PKR 10,000. Eligibility: Pakistani nationals enrolled in a recognized university, maximum family income PKR 45,000/month, minimum CGPA 2.5. Required Documents: CNIC copy, fee challan, income certificate, current transcript. Last date to apply: 25th April 2026. Submit applications at: https://hec.gov.pk/nbs2026. Priority will be given to students from underprivileged backgrounds.

subject: Google Summer of Code 2026 – Apply Now for Open Source Projects
body: Google Summer of Code (GSoC) 2026 applications are open! GSoC is a global program that offers stipends to university students for working on open source software during summer. Stipend: USD 1500–3300 based on country. Eligibility: Enrolled in an accredited university, 18 years or older. Required: Proposal submission, prior open source contributions (recommended), strong coding skills in Python, ML, NLP, LLMs, TensorFlow, or PyTorch preferred by many orgs. Application Deadline: 2nd May 2026. Apply at: https://summerofcode.withgoogle.com.

subject: Official Photograph – Final Year Students (Spring & Summer 2026)
body: Dear Students, This is to inform all final year students of BSCS, BSSE, BSAI, BBA, BSBA, and BSEE (Spring & Summer 2026) that a second opportunity has been arranged for those who were unable to get their official photographs taken. The photo booth will be set up on Tuesday, April 14, 2026 from 12:00 PM to 04:00 PM in Room G05. All concerned students are strongly advised to ensure their presence within the given time, as these photographs are mandatory and will be used for final transcripts, flex, and the graduate directory.

subject: Congratulations! You've won a FREE iPhone 16 Pro – Claim Now!
body: CONGRATULATIONS!!! You have been selected as the LUCKY WINNER of our monthly prize draw. You have won an iPhone 16 Pro worth PKR 450,000!!! To claim your prize, simply click the link below and provide your bank details: http://bit.ly/claimprize-xyz. Act NOW – this offer expires in 24 hours! Share this with 10 friends to get a bonus prize. This is NOT spam.

subject: LUMS NLP Research Lab – Summer Research Fellowship 2026
body: The LUMS NLP and AI Research Lab is offering a Summer Research Fellowship 2026 for outstanding undergraduate students passionate about Natural Language Processing and Artificial Intelligence. Duration: June 15 – August 15, 2026. Stipend: PKR 40,000/month. Eligibility: 3rd or 4th year BS students in Computer Science, minimum CGPA 3.3, demonstrated interest in NLP/ML. Required Documents: CV, transcript, 1-page research statement, and one reference letter. Deadline: 28th April 2026. Apply at: https://lums.edu.pk/nlpfellowship2026. Fellows will co-author research papers and present at seminars.

subject: Campus Pizza Fiesta – Friday Lunch Deals at the Cafeteria!
body: Hey FAST Fam! We're bringing back the PIZZA FIESTA every Friday at the campus cafeteria. Enjoy 2 slices of pizza + drink for only PKR 250 from 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM. No registration needed – just show up! Try our new Desi Fusion Pizza. – FAST Cafeteria Team.

subject: [LinkedIn] AI/ML Intern – FiveRivers Technologies, Lahore (Summer 2026)
body: Based on your profile, LinkedIn found a new job you may be interested in. Position: AI/ML Engineering Intern. Company: FiveRivers Technologies, Lahore. Duration: June–August 2026 (10 weeks, paid). Stipend: PKR 45,000/month. Eligibility: BS graduate or final year student in CS, SE, IT, EE, DS, or AI. Strong Python skills required. Familiarity with TensorFlow or PyTorch preferred. Responsibilities: Comprehensive AI/ML training and hands-on exposure to real-world projects in computer vision, NLP, and predictive analytics. Application Deadline: 22nd April 2026. Apply on LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/jobs/view/fiverivers-aiml-intern-2026. To stop receiving these alerts, update your preferences.

subject: [LinkedIn] Software Engineer Intern – Microsoft (Summer 2026)
body: New opportunity matching your skills: Software Engineer Internship at Microsoft. Location: Remote/Hybrid (open to international candidates). Duration: 12 weeks, Summer 2026 (June–August). Stipend: Competitive (USD equivalent). Eligibility: Currently pursuing a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related technical field. Must have at least one academic semester remaining after internship. Proficiency in one or more: C++, Java, Python or C#. Strong problem-solving skills, data structures, and algorithms required. Application Deadline: 30th April 2026. Apply at: https://careers.microsoft.com/students. Note: Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis — apply early!

subject: [LinkedIn] Data Science Intern – Arpatech (Pvt) Ltd., Lahore
body: LinkedIn Job Alert: Data Science Intern at Arpatech (Pvt) Ltd., Lahore. Arpatech is one of Pakistan's top tech companies specializing in web development, AI, and ML solutions. Role: Data Science / AI Intern. Duration: 8 weeks, starting May 2026. Stipend: PKR 30,000–40,000/month depending on skills. Eligibility: Final or penultimate year BSCS, BSAI, or related program students. Skills: Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn, basic ML knowledge. Required Documents: CV and portfolio/GitHub link. Deadline: 25th April 2026. Apply at: https://arpatech.com/careers/data-science-intern-2026.

subject: [LinkedIn] NLP Engineer Intern – Systems Limited, Lahore (Summer 2026)
body: We found a job you might like! NLP Engineer Intern at Systems Limited (Pakistan's largest IT company). Location: Lahore, Hybrid. Duration: June–September 2026. Stipend: PKR 55,000/month. Eligibility: 3rd/4th year students in BSCS or BSAI with CGPA 3.0+. Experience with NLP libraries (NLTK, SpaCy, Hugging Face Transformers) preferred. Responsibilities: Assist in developing text classification, sentiment analysis, and chatbot solutions using LLMs. Required Documents: CV, transcript, and brief cover letter. Deadline: 20th April 2026. Apply at: https://systemsltd.com/careers/nlp-intern-summer2026.

subject: Meta AI Research Residency Program 2026 – Apply Now
body: Dear Applicant, Meta AI is excited to announce the AI Research Residency Program 2026. This 12-month paid program is designed to give aspiring AI researchers hands-on experience working with Meta AI's cutting-edge research teams in machine learning, NLP, and computer vision. Eligibility: BS or MS graduates in CS, Math, Statistics, or related fields. Strong programming skills in Python and PyTorch. Published research or relevant project experience preferred but not required. Benefits: Competitive stipend (USD 7,000–9,000/month), health benefits, and opportunity to contribute to published research. Application Deadline: 5th May 2026. Apply at: https://ai.meta.com/join-us/residency-2026/. Open to international candidates — visa sponsorship provided for US-based positions.

subject: Amazon Applied Science Internship – NLP/LLM Track (Summer 2026)
body: Amazon is hiring Applied Science Interns for Summer 2026 in the NLP and Large Language Models (LLM) track. Location: Remote / Seattle / Hyderabad. Duration: 12 weeks. Compensation: USD 8,500–9,500/month. Eligibility: Currently enrolled in a PhD or MS program in CS, NLP, ML, Statistics, or related field. Strong publication record preferred. Skills: Python, PyTorch/TensorFlow, experience with transformer architectures, RAG pipelines, or LLM fine-tuning. Required: Resume, transcripts, and 2 reference letters. Application Deadline: 28th April 2026. Apply at: https://amazon.jobs/science-intern-summer2026.

subject: VYROTHON 2026 – Pakistan's Largest In-House AI Hackathon at NUST (April 18)
body: Dear Developer, VYROTHON 2026 — Pakistan's largest fully in-house hackathon — is happening on April 18, 2026 at Vyro Office, NSTP, NUST, Islamabad. The event runs 3 intense stages across 1 day with approximately USD 5,000 in prizes. Build AI-powered solutions, compete with the best minds in Pakistan, and get a chance to work with Vyro's product and engineering teams. Eligibility: University students and recent graduates across Pakistan (travel reimbursement available for outstation participants). Skills: AI, Machine Learning, Python, mobile/web development. Registration Deadline: 17th April 2026 (register at https://vyrothon.vyro.ai). Limited seats available — register now!

subject: DAAD Scholarship for Pakistani Students 2026 – MS/PhD in Germany
body: The German Academic Exchange Service (DAAD) invites applications from Pakistani students for its 2026 scholarship program for MS and PhD studies in Germany. Coverage: Full tuition waiver, monthly stipend of EUR 934 (MS) or EUR 1,200 (PhD), health insurance, and travel allowance. Eligibility: Pakistani nationals with a bachelor's degree (min. CGPA 3.0/4.0) from an HEC-recognized university. Must have at least 2 years of professional/research experience for some tracks. Language: Most STEM programs are in English. Fields preferred: Computer Science, AI, Engineering, Natural Sciences. Required Documents: CV, academic transcripts, motivation letter, 2 reference letters, language certificate. Deadline: 31st May 2026. Apply at: https://www.daad.pk/en/find-funding/.

subject: Fulbright Scholarship 2026–27 – Fully Funded MS in the USA
body: The United States Educational Foundation in Pakistan (USEFP) is accepting applications for the Fulbright Scholarship Program 2026–27. This is a fully funded scholarship for Pakistani students to pursue a Master's degree at top US universities. Coverage: Full tuition, living stipend (USD 2,000–2,500/month), health insurance, round-trip airfare, and J-1 visa support. Eligibility: Pakistani citizen, minimum 16 years of education (Bachelor's degree), minimum CGPA 3.0, minimum 2 years of work experience. Strong English proficiency required (TOEFL/IELTS). Fields: All fields eligible, STEM applicants especially encouraged. Required Documents: Online application, transcripts, 3 reference letters, English test scores. Application Deadline: 15th May 2026. Apply at: https://www.usefpakistan.org/fulbright.

subject: [LinkedIn] Machine Learning Intern – Folio3 AI, Karachi/Lahore
body: New job alert for you: Machine Learning Intern at Folio3 AI. Folio3 delivers enterprise-grade software and AI solutions. Location: Lahore or Karachi (hybrid). Duration: 3 months (June–August 2026). Stipend: PKR 40,000/month. Eligibility: Final-year BSCS, BSAI or related field. Skills required: Python, ML frameworks (Scikit-learn, PyTorch), SQL, data preprocessing. Responsibilities: Assist ML team in building predictive models, writing data pipelines, and deploying models to production using Flask or FastAPI. Required Documents: CV and GitHub profile. Deadline: 29th April 2026. Apply at: https://folio3.com/careers/ml-intern-2026.

subject: NUST AI Research Lab – Undergraduate Research Internship (Summer 2026)
body: NUST's Artificial Intelligence and Data Engineering (AIDE) Lab is offering summer research internships for outstanding undergraduate students from Pakistani universities. Duration: 8 weeks (June–August 2026). Stipend: PKR 25,000/month. Focus areas: NLP, Computer Vision, Reinforcement Learning, Agentic AI. Eligibility: 3rd or 4th year BS in CS, AI, EE, or related field. CGPA 3.2 or above. Required: CV, transcript, and a brief research statement (200 words). Deadline: 22nd April 2026. Apply at: https://nust.edu.pk/aide-internship2026. Top performers may be offered co-authorship on research papers.

subject: P@SHA ICT Award 2026 – Nominate Your Tech Project
body: Pakistan Software Houses Association (P@SHA) invites nominations for the prestigious ICT Awards 2026. Categories include: Best AI/ML Solution, Best FinTech App, Best EdTech Platform, Best Student Project, and more. Winners receive: Trophy, cash prize (PKR 200,000 for student category), and recognition at Pakistan's largest tech industry gala. Eligibility for Student Category: Enrolled students or recent graduates (within 1 year) of any Pakistani university with a software or AI project. Required: Project demo video, technical writeup (max 2000 words), and team info. Submission Deadline: 10th May 2026. Submit at: https://pasha.org.pk/ictawards2026.

subject: [LinkedIn] AI Automation Intern – Techionik Ltd, Lahore (Immediate Joining)
body: Job Alert: AI Automation Intern at Techionik Ltd (Lahore). This role involves building AI-powered automation solutions using Python, FastAPI, vector databases (Pinecone, Milvus), and LLM frameworks like LangChain. Eligibility: Students or recent graduates in CS, AI, Data Science, or related fields. Familiarity with AI/ML concepts and frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch). Backend experience with FastAPI or Flask is a plus. Type: Paid Internship, Immediate Joining Available. Stipend: PKR 35,000/month. Required: CV and GitHub profile link. No formal deadline — rolling applications. Apply at: https://linkedin.com/jobs/view/techionik-ai-intern.

subject: 🚨 URGENT: Your university account will be suspended in 24 hours!
body: IMPORTANT NOTICE FROM FAST-NUCES IT DEPARTMENT. Your university account is at risk of suspension due to unusual activity detected. To secure your account immediately, please click the link below and verify your credentials within 24 HOURS: http://bit.ly/fast-verify-now. Failure to comply will result in permanent account suspension and loss of access to the student portal. This is an automated message from the FAST-NUCES IT Security Team. Do not reply to this email. — FAST NUCES IT Helpdesk (security@fast-nuces-verify.net)

subject: OpenAI Residency Program 2026 – Research & Engineering Track
body: OpenAI invites applications for the 2026 Residency Program — a full-time paid program designed to help researchers and engineers transition into AI research. Duration: 6–12 months (San Francisco, CA). Compensation: USD 175,000/year (annualized salary equivalent for residents). Eligibility: Strong background in ML/DL, proficiency in Python and PyTorch. Demonstrated interest in AI safety, NLP, or large language models. No PhD required — exceptional BS/MS graduates welcome. Required: CV, brief research statement, and up to 3 examples of relevant work. Application Deadline: 1st May 2026. Apply at: https://openai.com/residency. US work authorization required or visa sponsorship available.

subject: FAST Alumni Networking Night – April 25th, Lahore Campus
body: Dear FAST Students, We are delighted to invite you to the FAST Alumni Networking Night, taking place on 25th April 2026, 6:00 PM onwards at FAST-NUCES Lahore Campus (Main Hall). This event connects current students with FAST alumni working at leading companies including Google, Microsoft, Systems Limited, Careem, and various startups. Agenda: Alumni panel discussion, networking dinner, and internship/job referral desk. This is a great opportunity to expand your professional network and learn from industry leaders. RSVP: https://fast.edu.pk/alumni-night-2026 by 22nd April. Dress code: Business casual. Seats are limited!

subject: Chevening Scholarship 2026–27 – Study in the UK (Fully Funded)
body: Chevening is the UK government's flagship international award programme, making awards to outstanding scholars around the world. Applications are now open for the 2026–27 cycle for Pakistani citizens. Coverage: Full tuition, monthly living allowance (GBP 1,000–1,300), flights, and visa fees. Eligibility: Pakistani citizen, completed undergraduate degree with strong academic record, minimum 2 years of work experience, English proficiency. Fields: All fields, with CS and AI graduates encouraged. Applications close: 5th November 2026 (rolling assessment). Apply early at: https://chevening.org/apply. This is a highly competitive award — start preparing your application now.

subject: IEEE FAST Student Branch – ICPC Practice Contest (Online, 26th April)
body: FAST IEEE Student Branch is organizing an online ICPC-style programming contest on 26th April 2026 to help FAST students prepare for upcoming international competitive programming competitions. Platform: Codeforces. Duration: 3 hours. Problem domains: Data Structures, Algorithms, Graph Theory, Dynamic Programming. Prizes: Top 3 winners receive Amazon gift vouchers (1st: PKR 5,000, 2nd: PKR 3,000, 3rd: PKR 2,000). Eligibility: All FAST-NUCES students. Registration Deadline: 24th April 2026. Register at: https://forms.gle/ieeefastlhr-icpc2026. Teams of 1–3 members allowed.

subject: Ignite National Technology Fund – Student Startup Seed Grant 2026
body: Ignite – National Technology Fund invites applications from university students for the Student Startup Seed Grant 2026. This grant provides early-stage funding to innovative tech startups founded by Pakistani students. Grant Amount: PKR 500,000 – PKR 2,000,000 depending on project scope. Eligibility: Enrolled students or recent graduates (within 2 years) from any HEC-recognized university. Team must include at least one technical co-founder with CS/IT background. Required: Business plan, prototype/MVP demo, and team profiles. Deadline: 15th May 2026. Apply at: https://ignite.org.pk/startup-grant-2026. Shortlisted teams will be invited to pitch in Islamabad.

subject: Make PKR 50,000/day from home – No experience needed! 🤑
body: Dear Friend, Are you tired of struggling financially as a student? We have an EXCLUSIVE opportunity to earn PKR 50,000 DAILY from the comfort of your home! No experience, no skills, no degree needed. Our members are already earning millions per month! Just click below and sign up TODAY to access the secret method: http://tinyurl.com/easymoney-pk. LIMITED SPOTS AVAILABLE — only 17 spots left in your city! Hurry before this offer expires. Join our WhatsApp group: wa.me/923XXXXXXXXX. This is 100% legal and halal. — EasyMoney Team

subject: [LinkedIn] AI Research Intern – Arbisoft (EdTech & AI Division), Lahore
body: Job Alert: AI Research Intern at Arbisoft – EdTech & AI Division, Lahore. Arbisoft is consistently ranked among Pakistan's top tech companies with a strong focus on AI and EdTech solutions. Role: AI/NLP Research Intern. Duration: 3 months (May–July 2026). Stipend: PKR 50,000/month. Eligibility: Final year BSCS or BSAI student with CGPA 3.2+. Strong Python skills and familiarity with Hugging Face, LangChain, or OpenAI APIs required. Responsibilities: Research and prototype AI features for EdTech platforms including intelligent tutoring systems and NLP-based assessment tools. Deadline: 21st April 2026. Apply at: https://arbisoft.com/careers/ai-nlp-intern-2026.

subject: ITU Punjab AI Research Fellowship – NLP & Generative AI Track (2026)
body: Information Technology University (ITU) Punjab is offering an AI Research Fellowship for the Summer 2026 semester, with a focus on Natural Language Processing and Generative AI. Duration: 10 weeks (June–August 2026). Fellowship Award: PKR 35,000/month + certificate of research completion. Eligibility: 3rd or 4th year students in Computer Science, Data Science, or Electrical Engineering from any Pakistani university. Minimum CGPA 3.0. Interest in LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG architectures, or AI evaluation required. Required Documents: CV, academic transcript, and a 500-word research interest statement. Deadline: 27th April 2026. Apply at: https://itu.edu.pk/ai-fellowship-2026.

subject: Huawei Seeds for the Future 2026 – Pakistan Cohort (Fully Funded Tech Program)
body: Huawei Technologies is pleased to announce Seeds for the Future 2026 – Pakistan. This prestigious fully funded program brings top CS and IT students from Pakistan to Huawei's headquarters in Shenzhen, China for a 2-week immersive tech training experience. Coverage: Flights, accommodation, meals, and training materials fully sponsored by Huawei. Eligibility: Pakistani students enrolled in an HEC-recognized university, pursuing BS in CS, EE, Telecom, or IT. CGPA 3.2+ required. Excellent academic record and English proficiency. Interest in 5G, AI, Cloud Computing, or IoT preferred. Required Documents: CV, transcripts, and a 300-word essay on 'The Future of AI in Pakistan'. Application Deadline: 5th May 2026. Nominate yourself at: https://huawei.com/pk/seedsforthefuture2026.

subject: FAST-NUCES Career Fair Spring 2026 – 30th April, Lahore Campus
body: Dear Students, FAST-NUCES Lahore Campus is hosting its Spring Career Fair 2026 on 30th April, 2026 from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Over 40 top companies will be present including Systems Limited, Arbisoft, Folio3, Netsol, 10Pearls, VentureDive, and several international tech firms. Opportunities available: Full-time positions, internships, and graduate trainee programs. Prepare your CV and dress professionally. Pre-registration is mandatory: https://fast.edu.pk/careerfair2026. Bring multiple printed copies of your CV. CS, AI, SE, and BBA final-year students are especially encouraged to attend.

subject: [LinkedIn] Graduate Trainee – AI/Data Science Track, 10Pearls Pakistan
body: LinkedIn Job Match: Graduate Trainee (AI/Data Science) at 10Pearls, Lahore/Karachi. 10Pearls is a leading digital innovation company with strong presence in AI and cloud. Program: 6-month paid Graduate Trainee program with full-time conversion opportunity. Monthly stipend: PKR 65,000 during training, promotion to PKR 90,000 after conversion. Eligibility: Recent graduates (class of 2025 or 2026) in BSCS, BSAI, BSDS, or related field. CGPA 3.0+. Skills: Python, SQL, ML fundamentals, data visualization. Required Documents: CV, transcript, and 1-page cover letter. Deadline: 3rd May 2026. Apply at: https://10pearls.com/careers/grad-trainee-ai-2026.
